tuning: E A D G B E
content:
(I like to add an Fsus2 after the F then back to an F to complete the measure even 
though it's not in the actual song)
For example:

[tab]                    [ch]Cm7[/ch]
You should let me love you[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Gm7[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]Fsus2[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]            
Let me be the one to give you everything you want and need[/tab]

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]            [ch]Gm7[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]    
Mmmm .....ah Mmmmm.... Yeah....Mmmmm....Yeah, Yeah, Yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]               [ch]Gm7[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]      
Mmmm...Yeah....Mmmm..... Yeah....Mmmmm....Yeah, Yeah[/tab]

[Verse 1:]

[tab] [ch]Cm7[/ch]
Baby I just don't get it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch] 
  Do you enjoy being hurt?[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]              
  I know you smelled the perfume, the make-up on his shirt[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch] 
You don't believe his stories[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch] 
  You know that they're all lies[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                    
  Bad as you are, you stick around and I just don't know why[/tab]

[Hook:]

[tab] [ch]Cm7[/ch]
If I was ya man (baby you)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]
  Never worry bout (what I do)[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                    
  I'd be coming home (back to you)Every night, doin' you right[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]
You're the type of woman (deserves good thangs)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]
  Wrist full of diamonds (hand full of rings)[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                      
  Baby you're a star (I just want to show you,you are)[/tab]

[Chorus:]
[tab]                     [ch]Cm7[/ch]
You should let me love you[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Gm7[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]            
Let me be the one to give you everything you want and need[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Cm7[/ch]
Baby good love and protection[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Make me your selection[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]F[/ch]     
Show you the way love's supposed to be[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Cm7[/ch]                 [ch]Gm7[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]     
Baby you should let me love you, love you, love you, looove you..yeaaah[/tab]

[Verse 2:]
[tab]     [ch]Cm7[/ch]
Listen[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]Gm7[/ch]                          [ch]F[/ch]
Your true beauty's description looks so good that it hurts[/tab]

You're a dime plus ninety-nine and it's a shame
[tab]                                [ch]Cm7[/ch]
Don't even know what you're worth[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Gm7[/ch] 
Everywhere you go they stop and stare[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]F[/ch]
Cause you're bad and it shows[/tab]

From your head to your toes, Out of control, baby you know

[Hook:]

[tab] [ch]Cm7[/ch]
If I was ya man (baby you)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]
  Never worry bout (what I do)[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                    
  I'd be coming home (back to you)[/tab]

Every night, doin' you right
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]
You're the type of woman (deserves good thangs)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]
  Wrist full of diamonds (hand full of rings)[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                     
  Baby you're a star (I just want to show you,you are)[/tab]

[Chorus:]
[tab]                     [ch]Cm7[/ch]
You should let me love you[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Gm7[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]            
Let me be the one to give you everything you want and need[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Cm7[/ch]
Baby good love and protection[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Make me your selection[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]F[/ch]     
Show you the way love's supposed to be[/tab]
                             
Baby you should let me 

[Bridge:]
[tab][ch]Abmaj7[/ch]             [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]                           
You deserve better girl (you know you deserve better)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gbmaj7[/ch]                  [ch]Dbmaj7[/ch]
  We should be together girl (baby)[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Abmaj7[/ch]             [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]                
With me and you it's whatever girl, hey![/tab]
[tab] [ch]Gbmaj7[/ch]                    [ch]Bbsus4[/ch]  
So can we make this thing ours?[/tab]

[Chorus:]

[tab][ch]F7/A[/ch]               [ch]Cm7[/ch]
You should let me love you[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Gm7[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]            
Let me be the one to give you everything you want and need[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Cm7[/ch]
Baby good love and protection[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Make me your selection[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]F[/ch]     
Show you the way love's supposed to be[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Cm7[/ch]                 
Baby you should let me love you, [/tab]

[repeat chorus 2 more time]

[Mario (talking):]
Let me love you that's all you need baby
